fields.label: Date Format
fields.description: Sets the app-wide date display format.

fields.label: Hide Get Started
fields.description: Hides the Get Started section from the sidebar. Change will be visible on restart or refreshing the app.

fields.label: Allow to bypass filters
fields.description: When linking documents, if no match is found and filtering is in effect, allow to disable filters.

fields.label: Remove Filter
fields.description: When enabled, removes all default filters applied across the system, showing all available options instead of filtered ones.

fields.label: Locale
fields.description: Set the local code. This is used for number formatting.

fields.label: Display Precision
fields.description: Sets how many digits are shown after the decimal point.

fields.label: Internal Precision
fields.description: Sets the internal precision used for monetary calculations. Above 6 should be sufficient for most currencies.

fields.label: Country Code
fields.description: Country code used to initialize regional settings.

fields.label: Dark mode
fields.description: Sets the theme of the app.

fields.label: Enable Cloud Sync
fields.description: Turns desktop cloud sync on or off.

fields.label: Sync Mode
fields.description: Use 'pilot' for controlled rollout and 'on' for normal operation.

fields.label: Sync Project ID
fields.description: Supabase project ref (for example: abcd1234efgh5678). RPC URLs are auto-derived from this value.

fields.label: Sync Company ID
fields.description: Remote company UUID used for sync scope.

fields.label: Sync Device ID
fields.description: Optional stable desktop identifier for diagnostics.

fields.label: Sync API URL Override
fields.description: Optional advanced override for push endpoint. Leave blank to auto-derive from Sync Project ID.

fields.label: Sync Pull API URL Override
fields.description: Optional advanced override for pull endpoint. Leave blank to auto-derive from Sync Project ID.

fields.label: Sync Auth Token
fields.description: Bearer/API token used for push/pull RPC calls.
